rule.description: Log injection
rule.name: rust/log-injection
rule.full_description: Building log entries from user-controlled sources is vulnerable to insertion of forged log entries by a malicious user.

message.text: Log entry depends on a user-provided value.

rule.description: Server-side request forgery
rule.name: rust/request-forgery
rule.full_description: Making a network request with user-controlled data in the URL allows for request forgery attacks.

message.text:
The URL of this request depends on a user-provided value.
The URL of this request depends on a user-provided value.

rule.description: Uncontrolled data used in path expression
rule.name: rust/path-injection
rule.full_description: Accessing paths influenced by users can allow an attacker to access unexpected resources.

message.text:
This path depends on a user-provided value.
This path depends on a user-provided value.
